title: Akamai: The Growth Story Is Not Yet Apparent
text: The market has misunderstood Akamai's Q1 2022 results. Two of the company's three verticals are growing at over 20%, with the third one financing the growth of the other two.

title: Akamai: Softening Business And Reduced Guidance
text: Due to the company's softening business, reduced guidance, and the current macro investment environment, I am lowering my rating on AKAM from BUY to HOLD. While Q1's results were relatively "ok", the outlook for the rest of the year is cloudy and after being goosed by the pandemic, AKAM's CDN business will likely be flat.

title: After Shedding 17% Last Month, Akamai Stock Looks Set To Turn Things Around
text: If you look at the change over the last ten days, too, the stock has lost 14%, underperforming the broader markets strongly.

title: Akamai Technologies To Host 2022 Analyst Day On Wednesday, May 18, at 8:30 a.m. ET in New York City
text: CAMBRIDGE, Mass. , May 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), the cloud company that powers and protects life online, will hold an in-person Analyst Day in New York City on Wednesday, May 18, 2022, as previously announced.

title: Why Is Akamai (AKAM) Stock Plunging 10% Today?
text: AKAM stock is in the red following first-quarter earnings. Specifically, weak guidance for Q2 seems to be bringing shares down.

title: Akamai (AKAM) Misses on Q1 Earnings Despite Higher Revenues
text: Akamai (AKAM) misses first-quarter 2022 earnings estimates on adverse tax impact.

title: Akamai Technologies, Inc. (AKAM) CEO Tom Leighton on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AKAM ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 3, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Tom Barth – Head-Investor Relations Tom Leighton – Co-Founder and Chief Executive Officer Ed McGowan – Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Keith Weiss – Morgan Stanley James Breen – William Blair Rishi Jaluria – RBC Tim Horan – Oppenheimer James Fish – Piper Sandler Amit Daryanani – Evercore ISI Frank Louthan – Raymond James Rudy Kessinger – D.A. Davidson Fatima Boolani – Citi Michael Elias – Cowen and Company Jeff Van Rhee – Craig-Hallum Will Power – Baird Operator Good day, and thank you for standing by.

title: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Lag Estimates
text: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -2.11% and 0.18%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Akamai stock falls 10% after mixed Q1 earnings
text: Akamai Technologies Inc. AKAM, +1.33% stock fell more than 10% in after-hours trading Tuesday after the cybersecurity and computing company reported a mixed first quarter. Akamai said it earned $119 million, or 73 cents a share, in the quarter, compared with $156 million, or 94 cents a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: AKAMAI REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2022 FINANCIAL RESULTS
text: First quarter revenue of  $904 million, up 7% year-over-year and up 9% when adjusted for foreign exchange* Security and Compute revenue represented the majority of total revenue in the first quarter and grew 25% year-over-year and 27% when adjusted for foreign exchange* Security revenue of $382 million, up 23% year-over-year and up 26% when adjusted for foreign exchange* Compute revenue of $78 million, up 32% year-over-year and up 35% when adjusted for foreign exchange* GAAP EPS of $0.73, down 22% year-over-year, and non-GAAP EPS* of $1.39, up 1% year-over-year CAMBRIDGE, Mass. , May 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), the world's most trusted solution to power and protect life online, today reported financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2022.

title: Cloud Stock Could Bounce Off Bullish Trendline
text: Cloud stock Akamai Technologies Inc (NASDAQ:AKAM) has been slipping since an April 15 peak of $123.25, which fell just short of its Jan. 27, 2021 record high of $124.91.
